name: Metadata Mender
description: Reconcile and complete Zotero item metadata using DOI/PMID against PubMed, OpenAlex, Crossref, Semantic Scholar, OpenAIRE (grey literature), Unpaywall, and CORE; resolves R packages via CRAN; records citation count, journal impact-factor surrogate, and open-access PDF link.
author: Raban Heller
